title: Spring Statement 2026: Key points at a glance
author: BBC News
content: Rachel Reeves has updated MPs on her economic plans, in a low-key statement that did not contain any major tax or spending measures. It comes as the Office for Budget Responsibility (OBR) - which monitors the public finances – unveiled its latest forecasts for the UK economy. Reeves conceded, however, that war in the Middle East meant the economic outlook has "become yet more uncertain". Here is a summary of the main points.
